university_identity.full_name: National University of Sciences and Technology (NUST)
university_identity.status: Federal university chartered by the Government of Pakistan and recognized by the HEC

engineering_and_it.name: School of Electrical Engineering and Computer Science
School of Civil and Environmental Engineering
School of Chemical and Materials Engineering
School of Mechanical and Manufacturing Engineering
College of Electrical and Mechanical Engineering

business_and_social_sciences.name: School of Art, Design and Architecture
School of Social Sciences and Humanities
Jinnah School of Public Policy and Leadership

health_and_life_sciences.name: NUST School of Health Sciences (MBBS & BSHND)

nust_entry_test_net.format: 200 MCQs, 3 hours duration, no negative marking
nust_entry_test_net.series: Conducted in multiple series; candidates can update preferences between series
nust_entry_test_net.rechecking: Available for paper-based test within 5 days (Fee: Rs 500)

standardized_tests.deadline: Scores must reach NUST by 25 July 2025

eligibility_nuances.general_rule: Minimum 60% marks in SSC and HSSC/Equivalent
eligibility_nuances.ics_candidates: Eligible for Engineering but must take remedial Chemistry in 1st semester
pre_medical_candidates: Eligible for Engineering if they pass additional Mathematics
Eligible for BS CS if they pass 6 credit hours of deficient Math within one year
eligibility_nuances.dae_candidates: Minimum 60% in Matric and DAE; limited to specific PEC-approved programs
eligibility_nuances.non_fsc_equivalence: IBCC Equivalence certificate is mandatory; O/A-level grade sheets are not enough

processing_fees.national_dual_nationals: Rs 5,000 (USD 40) per NET or ACT/SAT application
processing_fees.foreign_nationals: Rs 10,000 (USD 80) per NET or ACT/SAT application
processing_fees.exemptions: 1st, 2nd, and 3rd position holders in BISE HSSC exams

campus_life_and_services.hostels: Available for male and female students at H-12 campus, including MBBS
campus_life_and_services.transport: Pick-and-drop for Rawalpindi/Islamabad on specified routes for a fee
campus_life_and_services.orientation: Mandatory session for new students to learn about facilities and rules
campus_life_and_services.medical_support: MBBS students follow standard NUST housing and dining procedures

step_by_step_application: 3. Pay processing fee via 1Link or Credit Card
4. Download admit card and appear for NET
5. Check results online (24 hours for computer-based, 5-7 days for paper)
6. Monitor merit list and selection notifications
7. Verify documents and pay admission fees to confirm seat
